dts: Short video: 'DVSA test dates are 6 months out — here's how learners are getting them in 2 weeks' (30 sec, voiceover on screen recording of the swap flow)

athletics: Slow-mo muscle-up or L-sit attempt — raw footage, no edit needed, caption: 'Progress is quiet until it isn't'
